description_long: This object is a freestanding, octagonal sign with a bold red face and a white border, reminiscent of a stop sign but featuring custom text. The front displays the large white letters 'RP' above the words 'RECURSOS DE MULTAS', with a rectangular base that includes a phone number and a phone icon in white. The sign is solid and appears to be made of painted metal or plastic, with a smooth, glossy finish. The sides are flat and reveal the thickness of the sign and its base, both of which are consistent in color and material. The sign is not mounted on a pole but instead stands upright on its own base, making it portable and suitable for temporary placement in urban environments. The overall design is highly visible and intended to attract attention, likely for informational or advertising purposes related to traffic fines.
description: A red, freestanding octagonal sign with white text and a rectangular base displaying a phone number, designed for high visibility in urban settings.
description_view_0: Rear view of the red octagonal sign, showing mirrored white text and the rectangular base with reversed phone number.
description_view_1: Side profile of the sign, highlighting its flat, uniform thickness and the connection between the octagonal face and the rectangular base.
description_view_2: Front view of the sign, clearly displaying 'RP RECURSOS DE MULTAS' in white and the phone number with icon on the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the flat edge and thickness of the sign and base.
